{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "J-Six Group has eight locations in Lagos State, and subsidiaries in the FMCG distribution, agribusiness, agricultural, and quick service restaurant (QSR) industries. We are positioned to offer reasonable discounts on purchases, high-quality products, and customer satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Locations: Lekki Phase 1 &amp; Ijora, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Build and maintain good relationships with new and existing suppliers.
	Liaise with vendors and suppliers on behalf of the restaurant and compare proposals for price and specifications.
	Secure products and services at the best possible price without compromising on quality or service.
	Review, negotiate, and agree on contracts, monitoring the quality of service and product provided.
	Ensure all products ordered are received, accounted for, and processed, both physically and on internal systems, to ensure the best due process.
	Assist the kitchen staff to optimize the cost of raw materials and control costs by researching products and collaborating with internal and external teams to source the best products and follow best practices.


Requirements


	A minimum of HND in Business Administration / Purchasing &amp; Supply / Accounting / Hospitality Management / or related field.
	At least 2 year of experience as a Procurement Officer in the food and beverage, culinary, or related area is a must.
	MS Office proficiency and knowledge of any ERP software are added advantages.
	Outstanding interpersonal and leadership skills with strong negotiation skills.
	Ability to communicate effectively to ensure transparency on all matters.
	In-depth knowledge of contracts, invoicing, and negotiation terms.
	Outstanding numerical skills and the ability to pay attention to details.
	Outstanding organizational and time management skills.
	Problem solver with a strong analytical mindset.


Net Salary and Benefit


	Salary: N100,000 - N130,000 monthly
	HMO.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: recruitment@jsixgroup.com using the Job Position and preferred location as the subject of the email.",

Procurement Officer Job at J-Six Group




        
    

        
        J-Six Group has eight locations in Lagos State, and subsidiaries in the FMCG distribution, agribusiness, agricultural, and quick service restaurant (QSR) industries. We are positioned to offer reasonable discounts on purchases, high-quality products, and customer satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Locations: Lekki Phase 1 & Ijora, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Build and maintain good relationships with new and existing suppliers.
	Liaise with vendors and suppliers on behalf of the restaurant and compare proposals for price and specifications.
	Secure products and services at the best possible price without compromising on quality or service.
	Review, negotiate, and agree on contracts, monitoring the quality of service and product provided.
	Ensure all products ordered are received, accounted for, and processed, both physically and on internal systems, to ensure the best due process.
	Assist the kitchen staff to optimize the cost of raw materials and control costs by researching products and collaborating with internal and external teams to source the best products and follow best practices.


Requirements


	A minimum of HND in Business Administration / Purchasing & Supply / Accounting / Hospitality Management / or related field.
	At least 2 year of experience as a Procurement Officer in the food and beverage, culinary, or related area is a must.
	MS Office proficiency and knowledge of any ERP software are added advantages.
	Outstanding interpersonal and leadership skills with strong negotiation skills.
	Ability to communicate effectively to ensure transparency on all matters.
	In-depth knowledge of contracts, invoicing, and negotiation terms.
	Outstanding numerical skills and the ability to pay attention to details.
	Outstanding organizational and time management skills.
	Problem solver with a strong analytical mindset.


Net Salary and Benefit


	Salary: N100,000 - N130,000 monthly
	HMO.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position and preferred location as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Executive - Commercial Sales",
  "description": "Dragnet Solutions Limited is a firm that specializes in the design, development and implementation of people screening solutions that can be deployed in a variety of uses covering both the workplace and the educational arena.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Executive - Commercial Sales

Job Location: Lagos (Remote)

Job Summary


	We are seeking Account Executives to join our Commercial/Sales team.
	The Account Executive will be responsible for managing assigned client accounts, identifying new business opportunities, following up on leads, preparing proposals, and supporting the conversion of opportunities into revenue.
	This role will support Dragnet&rsquo;s commercial growth across business areas such as recruitment, scholarships, assessments, Achieva, and other enterprise solutions.
	The ideal candidate should have experience in sales, business development, account management, client relationship management, or B2B commercial roles. Direct experience in all Dragnet business areas is not required, but the candidate must be able to learn quickly, engage clients confidently, and follow through on opportunities.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and follow up on new business opportunities.
	Manage assigned client accounts and prospects.
	Support renewals, upsells, cross-sells, and account expansion opportunities.
	Engage clients to understand their needs, timelines, and decision-making process.
	Prepare and support proposals, quotations, presentations, and commercial documents.
	Follow up on leads, client enquiries, proposals, and pending decisions.
	Maintain an active sales pipeline with clear next steps and expected timelines.
	Schedule and attend client meetings, presentations, and follow-up discussions.
	Work with internal teams to ensure client requirements are properly understood and delivered.
	Provide regular updates on opportunities, client engagements, proposals, and blockers.
	Support revenue growth across assigned products, services, and client segments.


Qualifications &amp; Skills


	Education: Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Social Sciences, or a related field.


Experience:


	3&ndash;5 years of experience in sales, business development, account management, client relationship management, or a related commercial role.
	Experience in B2B sales, enterprise sales, HR solutions, recruitment, assessments, training, technology, education, or professional services will be an advantage.
	Prior experience managing corporate clients or sales accounts is preferred.


Skills Requirements:


	Strong sales and client relationship management skills.
	Good communication, presentation, and negotiation skills.
	Strong follow-up and attention to detail.
	Ability to identify client needs and match them to relevant solutions.
	Ability to manage multiple clients, opportunities, and deadlines.
	Good understanding of sales pipeline tracking and reporting.
	Target-driven mindset and willingness to take ownership of assigned accounts.
	Ability to work well with internal teams to move opportunities forward.
	Confidence in engaging corporate clients and decision-makers.


Remuneration and Benefits


	Competitive salary package
	Call and data allowance
	Remote work flexibility
	Free access to Udemy courses
	Opportunities for professional growth and impact.


Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-27",

Account Executive - Commercial Sales Job at Dragnet Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Dragnet Solutions Limited is a firm that specializes in the design, development and implementation of people screening solutions that can be deployed in a variety of uses covering both the workplace and the educational arena.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Executive - Commercial Sales

Job Location: Lagos (Remote)

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking Account Executives to join our Commercial/Sales team.
	The Account Executive will be responsible for managing assigned client accounts, identifying new business opportunities, following up on leads, preparing proposals, and supporting the conversion of opportunities into revenue.
	This role will support Dragnet’s commercial growth across business areas such as recruitment, scholarships, assessments, Achieva, and other enterprise solutions.
	The ideal candidate should have experience in sales, business development, account management, client relationship management, or B2B commercial roles. Direct experience in all Dragnet business areas is not required, but the candidate must be able to learn quickly, engage clients confidently, and follow through on opportunities.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and follow up on new business opportunities.
	Manage assigned client accounts and prospects.
	Support renewals, upsells, cross-sells, and account expansion opportunities.
	Engage clients to understand their needs, timelines, and decision-making process.
	Prepare and support proposals, quotations, presentations, and commercial documents.
	Follow up on leads, client enquiries, proposals, and pending decisions.
	Maintain an active sales pipeline with clear next steps and expected timelines.
	Schedule and attend client meetings, presentations, and follow-up discussions.
	Work with internal teams to ensure client requirements are properly understood and delivered.
	Provide regular updates on opportunities, client engagements, proposals, and blockers.
	Support revenue growth across assigned products, services, and client segments.


Qualifications & Skills


	Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Social Sciences, or a related field.


Experience:


	3–5 years of experience in sales, business development, account management, client relationship management, or a related commercial role.
	Experience in B2B sales, enterprise sales, HR solutions, recruitment, assessments, training, technology, education, or professional services will be an advantage.
	Prior experience managing corporate clients or sales accounts is preferred.


Skills Requirements:


	Strong sales and client relationship management skills.
	Good communication, presentation, and negotiation skills.
	Strong follow-up and attention to detail.
	Ability to identify client needs and match them to relevant solutions.
	Ability to manage multiple clients, opportunities, and deadlines.
	Good understanding of sales pipeline tracking and reporting.
	Target-driven mindset and willingness to take ownership of assigned accounts.
	Ability to work well with internal teams to move opportunities forward.
	Confidence in engaging corporate clients and decision-makers.


Remuneration and Benefits


	Competitive salary package
	Call and data allowance
	Remote work flexibility
	Free access to Udemy courses
	Opportunities for professional growth and impact.


Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Sow is renowned for its sales, marketing and property management whilst emphasizing on the highest levels of excellence and Luxury. Sow Real Estate has its headquarters in FCT, Abuja with branch offices in Lagos and Port Harcourt.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Architect / Site Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Architect / Site Manager to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for architectural design, site supervision, project coordination, and ensuring that construction projects are delivered according to approved designs, specifications, budget, and timeline.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare architectural designs, construction drawings, and technical documentation.
	Develop high-quality 2D drawings and 3D renderings for project presentations.
	Supervise construction activities to ensure compliance with approved plans and quality standards.
	Coordinate with engineers, contractors, artisans, and consultants throughout project execution.
	Conduct site inspections and prepare progress reports.
	Monitor project schedules, budgets, and material usage.
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and building regulations.
	Resolve design and construction issues promptly.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Architecture or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of professional experience in architectural design and site management.
	Proficiency in architectural software such as AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, ArchiCAD, Lumion, 3ds Max, or similar.
	Strong understanding of construction methods, building codes, and project management.
	Excellent communication, leadership, and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Application Documents


	An updated CV.
	A portfolio containing samples of architectural drawings.
	Samples of 2D and 3D renderings completed by the applicant.
	Any relevant certifications (optional but an advantage).


Note


	Only candidates who submit a portfolio showcasing architectural drawings and 2D/3D renderings will be considered.
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Architect / Site Manager Job at Sow Real Estate Limited




        
    

        
        Sow Real Estate is a world-class luxury real estate super brand, with its core interest in the delivery of mass housing and luxury apartments. Sow is renowned for its sales, marketing and property management whilst emphasizing on the highest levels of excellence and Luxury. It is our mandate to systematically provide structure and infrastructure reflective of today’s technological advancement to meet the basic needs of housing. Sow Real Estate has its headquarters in FCT, Abuja with branch offices in Lagos and Port Harcourt.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Architect / Site Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time
     

            
    



Job Description


	We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Architect / Site Manager to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for architectural design, site supervision, project coordination, and ensuring that construction projects are delivered according to approved designs, specifications, budget, and timeline.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare architectural designs, construction drawings, and technical documentation.
	Develop high-quality 2D drawings and 3D renderings for project presentations.
	Supervise construction activities to ensure compliance with approved plans and quality standards.
	Coordinate with engineers, contractors, artisans, and consultants throughout project execution.
	Conduct site inspections and prepare progress reports.
	Monitor project schedules, budgets, and material usage.
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and building regulations.
	Resolve design and construction issues promptly.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Architecture or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of professional experience in architectural design and site management.
	Proficiency in architectural software such as AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, ArchiCAD, Lumion, 3ds Max, or similar.
	Strong understanding of construction methods, building codes, and project management.
	Excellent communication, leadership, and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send the following to: [email protected] using "Architect / Site Manager Application – [Your Name]" as the subject of the mail.

Application Documents


	An updated CV.
	A portfolio containing samples of architectural drawings.
	Samples of 2D and 3D renderings completed by the applicant.
	Any relevant certifications (optional but an advantage).


Note


	Only candidates who submit a portfolio showcasing architectural drawings and 2D/3D renderings will be considered.
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Operations Manager",
  "description": "Iknorbert Communications Limited was established as a company in 2012 after a critical research and observation of the need for a wider deep distribution channel for communication products within the African continent. Hence the establishment with the aim of sales and distribution of information communication technology and allied products within the Africa continent. At IKNORBERT, our products, people and business model are of standard and second to none within the industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Operations Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly organized and strategic Sales Operations Manager to oversee the day-to-day business activities of our mobile devices, phone accessories and Solar (Energy) enterprise.
	A Sales Operations Manager in a mobile phones, accessories and Solar (Energy) business oversees day-to-day sales operations, supply chain management, and control.
	They ensure wholesale and retail outlets run efficiently, manage vendor relationships, drive revenue targets, and optimize customer service to maximize profitability.


Key Responsibilities
Inventory &amp; Supply Chain Management:


	Maintain optimal stock levels of fast-moving smartphones, tablets, and high-demand accessories (e.g., chargers, cases, screen guards) and Solar to prevent stock-outs.
	Oversee procurement, customs clearing (for imported products), and secure warehousing/logistics.
	Conduct regular stock audits and implement strategies to minimize shrinkage, theft, and damage.
	Sales &amp; Retail Operations: Monitor sales performance across all physical wholesales and retail stores platforms
	Set and track Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for Team Leads and floor sales


Customer Service &amp; After-Sales Support:


	Ensure excellent customer experiences, from in-store product demonstrations to after-sales support.
	Manage the end-to-end warranty claim process, device returns, and repairs in Team Leadership &amp; Administration
	Train, and mentor retail staff, ensuring they have deep product knowledge and excellent sales techniques.
	Manage staff scheduling, attendance, and performance-based incentive programs across all locations.
	Oversee daily cash reconciliations, petty cash management, and revenue reporting.
	Monitor budgets and identify cost-reduction opportunities to maximize profit margins.


Requirements


	Education: Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, or a related field.
	Experience: 5 - 12 years of progressive operational experience, preferably in retail, consumer electronics, or telecommunications.
	Skills: Strong understanding of supply chain logistics, proficiency with Accounting Software.
	Competencies: Strong leadership, data-driven decision-making, problem-solving, and the ability to work under pressure
	Knowledge of Microsoft Suite (Word, PowerPoint, Excel, etc is mandatory.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@iknorbert.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only candidates resident or who have accomodation in Portharcourt, Rivers State should apply.",

Sales Operations Manager Job at Iknorbert Communications Limited




        
    

        
        Iknorbert Communications Limited was established as a company in 2012 after a critical research and observation of the need for a wider deep distribution channel for communication products within the African continent. Hence the establishment with the aim of sales and distribution of information communication technology and allied products within the Africa continent. At IKNORBERT, our products, people and business model are of standard and second to none within the industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Operations Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

            
    




	We are seeking a highly organized and strategic Sales Operations Manager to oversee the day-to-day business activities of our mobile devices, phone accessories and Solar (Energy) enterprise.
	A Sales Operations Manager in a mobile phones, accessories and Solar (Energy) business oversees day-to-day sales operations, supply chain management, and control.
	They ensure wholesale and retail outlets run efficiently, manage vendor relationships, drive revenue targets, and optimize customer service to maximize profitability.


Key Responsibilities
Inventory & Supply Chain Management:


	Maintain optimal stock levels of fast-moving smartphones, tablets, and high-demand accessories (e.g., chargers, cases, screen guards) and Solar to prevent stock-outs.
	Oversee procurement, customs clearing (for imported products), and secure warehousing/logistics.
	Conduct regular stock audits and implement strategies to minimize shrinkage, theft, and damage.
	Sales & Retail Operations: Monitor sales performance across all physical wholesales and retail stores platforms
	Set and track Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for Team Leads and floor sales


Customer Service & After-Sales Support:


	Ensure excellent customer experiences, from in-store product demonstrations to after-sales support.
	Manage the end-to-end warranty claim process, device returns, and repairs in Team Leadership & Administration
	Train, and mentor retail staff, ensuring they have deep product knowledge and excellent sales techniques.
	Manage staff scheduling, attendance, and performance-based incentive programs across all locations.
	Oversee daily cash reconciliations, petty cash management, and revenue reporting.
	Monitor budgets and identify cost-reduction opportunities to maximize profit margins.


Requirements


	Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, or a related field.
	Experience: 5 - 12 years of progressive operational experience, preferably in retail, consumer electronics, or telecommunications.
	Skills: Strong understanding of supply chain logistics, proficiency with Accounting Software.
	Competencies: Strong leadership, data-driven decision-making, problem-solving, and the ability to work under pressure
	Knowledge of Microsoft Suite (Word, PowerPoint, Excel, etc is mandatory.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only candidates resident or who have accomodation in Portharcourt, Rivers State should apply.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

            
    




   


    
        Similar Jobs

Procurement / Store Officer Job at Green Care Medical Consultants and Fertility Center




        
    

        
        Green Care Medical Consultants and Fertility Center - We are committed to providing expert, compassionate healthcare tailored to your needs. From advanced fertility treatments to help you conceive, to comprehensive women’s health and maternity care, we support you through every stage of life. Our dedicated team also offers specialized pediatric and neonatal care, general and specialized surgeries, and emergency medical services to ensure you and your loved ones receive the best possible care. Your health and well-being are our top priorities. Greencare offers families trying to conceive variety of treatments through Medical Science and Technology along side consultations.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement / Store Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Key Responsibilities


	Inventory and vendor management.


Qualification


	Interested candidates should possess an OND / HND / Bachelor's Degree.


Method of Application
